Translation.Description: Legendary gladiator Black Spike was said to be invincible in the arena, piling up victories and corpses, slaying champions and monsters alike with tireless and relentless determination. His armor's aerodynamics were so perfectly designed that it was said to move of its own accord.
Translation.Provides: Collect three Black Spike items to inflict Dismantling Stroke- +400% Crushing Blow Attack
